use_cases: Displaying global satellite or network node locations on an interactive 3D globe
Visualizing geographic data distribution across the world
Creating interactive world maps for analytics dashboards
Building satellite tracking or coverage visualization interfaces
Adding geographic context to data-heavy applications
ai_summary: Interactive 3D globe component using WebGL that displays satellite markers at specified geographic coordinates. Features smooth auto-rotation, drag-to-rotate interaction, and customizable marker positions. Built with the cobe library for performant WebGL rendering, making it suitable for analytics dashboards, network visualization tools, or any application requiring global geographic data display.
